taxonomy: Tragacantha pulsiferae is a species of plant, and its classification is as follows: it belongs to the genus Tragacantha, which is a type of thorny shrub or small tree. The genus Tragacantha is further classified under the family Fabaceae, also known as the legume family. This family consists of a wide range of plants, including beans, peas, and lentils. Within the Fabaceae family, Tragacantha pulsiferae is also a member of the tribe Faboideae. The exact classification of this plant may be subject to ongoing research and refinement.
